indicators.name: large kitchen counter
indicators.rationale: The kitchen counter is too large and not designed for computer work, making it less suitable for solo work.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for comfortable long-term computer work.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting for computer work
indicators.rationale: The lighting is ambient and does not provide task illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated area for computer work
indicators.rationale: The kitchen is not designed for computer work, and there is no dedicated area for it.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large kitchen counter and lack of flat personal work surface make it difficult to set up a computer workstation. There is no ergonomic seating, dedicated lighting, or a dedicated area for computer work, which significantly undermines its suitability for solo computer work.
